item.title: An Incel's Evil Plan Broadcast Across Social Media
item.description: A factual look at a case involving an incel’s criminal plan shared on social media, examining the events, investigation, and consequences.

item.title: A Promise of Help Turned Deadly | Cherish Perrywinkle

item.title: He Recorded All Of His Crimes In A DIARY!
item.description: A factual overview of a case where an individual documented their crimes in a diary, focusing on the investigation and key details respectfully.

item.title: A Crime So Unimaginable It Inspired a Hollywood Movie
item.description: A real‑life case so shocking it became the basis for a major film. What disturbing events pushed this story from tragedy into cinematic history?

item.title: An Affair That Broke a Beautiful, Happy Marriage
item.description: A relationship that seemed unshakeable falls apart overnight. What secret decision shattered a family that looked perfect from the outside?
